case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BORLONGAN, ANNA V AKA REYES, ANN V

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BORLONGAN, ANNA V  AKA  REYES, ANN V ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
